content.en:
The final moments of the multidimensional catastrophe of death.

Territory of the Four Thousand.

A vine is born, and after this vine is born, it grows rapidly.

Soon after, a Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation creature was entwined by the vine and then sucked everything dry.

Since then, this vine has continued to skyrocket, becoming larger than an extradimensional realm, and continues to expand and expand, so frightened that a nearby overlord-level extradimensional force immediately took away a group of living beings and fled, and most of them gave up.

No fifth realm dares to approach, anyone can see that this vine is too terrifying, and the fifth realm can't deal with it at all.

The first time.

Ye Tian came here, saw this vine, and immediately guessed its origin.

"It turned out to be a dimensional rule thing, and it was so huge, this value could be many times higher than that dimensional rule thing of the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, and the value was definitely no less than an ordinary dimensional treasure!" Ye Tian estimated.

He didn't do it right away, he waited.

He could see that this dimensional rule thing hadn't really grown yet, and it would take a while to grow, and if he killed it now, the value of 29 would be much lower.

And he sensed that in addition to him, there were more than one Sixth Realm Transcendent Realm ambushing nearby.

"The extradimensional realm of the sixth realm should come from the upper domain!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed slowly, and more and more Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation creatures were strangled and absorbed by this vine.

And secretly, there is also the Sixth Realm to drive away some Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation creatures, so that the last batch of Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation creatures of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation are becoming fewer and fewer.

Millions of extradimensional epochs have passed, and the creatures of the Fifth Realm Multidimensional Tribulation are already very rare, and this vine is finally about to complete its transformation and become a true dimensional rule thing.

this day.

The transformation of this vine is complete.

The first time.

Bang!!!

The three Sixth Realm and the four Sixth Realm multidimensional beings shot at the same time, snatching this vine one after another.

"Everyone, give me a face in the Shangqing Feather Palace, and give me this thing with dimensional rules!"

A Sixth Realm Extradimensional Realm spoke.

"Get out!"

The other Sixth Realms roared one after another.

As for those sixth-realm multi-dimensional beings, it is even more impossible to give this sixth realm face of the Shangqing Feather Palace, they are from the eleventh dimension, and they have nothing to do with the upper domain of the super-dimensional realm, and there is no need to be afraid of the Shangqing Feather Palace.

"Kill!"

These Sixth Realm Mansions were slaughtered just to fight for this vine.

This vine itself also has attack power, second only to the Sixth Realm, but it is not enough to face these Sixth Realms at all.

In an instant, one attack after another shattered the vine.

Wow!

Ye Tian also made a move, grabbed a vine as soon as possible, and then quickly put it away.

"Look for death!"

Seeing that Ye Tian and the fifth realm dared to snatch it, the other sixth realms hit Ye Tian with a casual blow, wanting to wipe Ye Tian to death.

However, they underestimated Ye Tian.

Their casual blow couldn't shake Ye Tian at all, and Ye Tian directly cast the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Skill to hit one of the Sixth Realms.

"Sword Eleven!"

This Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect erupted, directly penetrating all of the Sixth Realm's defenses.

Burst!!!

Half of the Sixth Realm's body was almost annihilated, his whole body was cracked, and there was blood in his mouth, and he couldn't stop the injury at all.

He directly urged an escaped object, turned into a ray of light and disappeared.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill the other party, he had more important things to do.

Thundered!!!!

The Sixth Realm was shocked by Ye Tian's Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, and they besieged Ye Tian one after another, but they couldn't defeat Ye Tian.

A Sixth Realm directly urged the Eleventh Dimension's Will Peerless Technique to attack Ye Tian, and Ye Tian also used the Eleventh Dimension's Will Peerless Eternal Pagoda Technique to easily resist their attack.

After a while, a sixth-realm multi-dimensional life was severely injured by Ye Tian, and it was almost about to fall, and the other party had nothing to save his life, so he soon fell.

"Run!"

The other Sixth Realms fled one after another, it was really Ye Tian who was too powerful, they were not opponents at all!

As soon as they left, Ye Tian directly cut off this vine by the roots and took it all away.

......

"This harvest is good, such a huge dimensional rule thing can be distributed to my relatives and even some Terran powerhouses with great potential. Even if you take it out and trade it later, you can exchange it for enough wealth. "

Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

In the years that followed, the multidimensional catastrophe of death was almost over, and there was nothing dangerous.

At this time, those Fifth Realms also dared to come out, wanting to take advantage of the end of the time to collect some resources.

this day.

The Death Multidimensional Tribulation is completely over, those Death Tribulation powers have begun to dissipate, and only a few places have retained the original Death Tribulation Power, which is a forbidden area that ordinary extradimensional realms dare not step into.

Another period of time has passed, and extradimensional realms have begun to re-emerge.

At this time.

Ye Tian led the Terran to the more than 4,000 territories, and then released the powerhouses of the Terran and let them occupy the extradimensional territories.

In this regard, the other surviving forces did not dare to say anything at all.

After a long period of time, many extradimensional realms have been reborn340, countless extradimensional realms have been born, and the footprints of the human race have spread all over countless extradimensional realms.

As for the other forces, how many people are left, it is completely less than a fraction of the human race.

And so.

The Terrans began to multiply vigorously, and countless Terrans multiplied, occupying a large number of territories, gradually making many extra-dimensional territories lively, but it was no longer a scene of a hundred flowers blooming and all kinds of prosperity, but the Terran family was dominant, almost the extra-dimensional territory of the Terrans.

Tens of millions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

The number of Terrans has skyrocketed by hundreds of thousands of times, spreading across all extradimensional territories, and the scope of other forces has been suppressed to the point that it is difficult to make any progress.

And Ye Tian took out the resources obtained during the Death Multidimensional Tribulation as a reward, and cultivated some Fifth Realms.

Gradually, the number of the fifth realm of the human race has exceeded ten.

this day.

Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, finally comprehended a dimensional rule, and spent a lot of Ye Tian's resources, but he finally comprehended a dimensional rule.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian gave Ye Xingchen a piece of the dimensional rules, and asked him to use the dimensional rules to understand the dimensional rules, and handed over the trivial matters of the human race to Ye Xingchen to manage.

He cultivates with peace of mind and improves the realm of dimensional rules, and he wants to comprehend the eightfold dimensional rules.
